docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LLOYD, THOMAS

MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON JUL-12-2023 IN DEPT. 206 - HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF THOMAS LLOYD'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTS WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND DENIES WITH PREJUDICE AS TO COURT-APPOINTED INTERPRETER FEES FOR A WITNESS, FEES FOR A PEACE OFFICER TO TESTIFY IN COURT AND FEES FOR COURT-APPOINTED EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST THOMAS LLOYD FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-12-2024, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-28-2024. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
